{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Universal Manufacturing secure cargo transport ship
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Universal Manufacturing secure cargo transport ship]] contains a [[vault]] with an AI monitoring its security cameras.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
